title: China Deploys 50,000 Humanoid Units in Shenzhen Electronics Factories
aiSummary: Chinese state-backed manufacturer deployed 50,000 humanoid units across Shenzhen electronics factories, the largest single deployment globally.
keyInsight: China's 50,000-unit deployment is the world's largest, confirming its lead in humanoid adoption scale.

title: Tesla Optimus Reaches 1000 Units Deployed in Factory
aiSummary: Tesla deployed 1000 Optimus units in its Texas Gigafactory, marking first mass humanoid deployment in North American industry.
keyInsight: First large-scale commercial humanoid deployment signals manufacturing sector tipping point.

title: Figure AI Raises $675M to Scale Robot Workforce
aiSummary: Figure AI raised $675M Series B to scale its humanoid robot workforce for automotive and logistics deployments in the US and Germany.
keyInsight: Largest humanoid startup funding round signals investor conviction in near-term labor displacement.

title: Germany's IG Metall Warns of 2M Manufacturing Jobs at Risk
aiSummary: Germany's largest manufacturing union warns 2 million jobs face displacement from humanoid automation by 2032, calling for new labor protections.
keyInsight: Union acknowledgment confirms automation impact is now a mainstream industrial concern in Germany.

title: South Korea Announces National Robotics Strategy 2030
aiSummary: South Korea's government unveiled a national strategy to lead humanoid robotics manufacturing by 2030, investing $2B in R&D.
keyInsight: Government-backed investment confirms South Korea's position as top humanoid adoption country.

title: Japan's Fanuc Unveils Solar-Powered Humanoid for Agriculture
aiSummary: Fanuc's new solar-powered agricultural humanoid achieves sub-$8/day TCO in Japan's rice paddies, targeting 40% cost reduction vs human labor.
keyInsight: Solar offset achieving sub-$8/day TCO in agriculture accelerates Japan's adoption timeline.

title: Singapore Pilots Humanoid Robot Healthcare Assistants
aiSummary: Singapore's Ministry of Health piloting 200 humanoid assistants in public hospitals, targeting elder care and logistics roles.
keyInsight: Healthcare sector adoption in Singapore signals expansion beyond manufacturing into services.
